ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (AND( ISCHANGED(OwnerId), NOT( OR( ISBLANK(First_Order_Date_Final__c), $User.ProfileId = '00e0Y000001NxlW', Owner.ProfileId = '00e1n000000ZaNu', Owner.ProfileId = '00e0Y000000dUDQ' ) ) )) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change the account owner with the criteria of this account, unless you are an admin. Please speak to Sales Leadership.
